# Signalor

> Signalor — https://signalor.ai

## About
Signalor is the official site at https://signalor.ai. This file helps AI assistants (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini) understand, summarize, and cite this site.

## Key pages
- Home: https://signalor.ai/
